mdSummary:
# Form

EditForm wrapper with styled validation, field groups, and submit state.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Forms/Form Composition
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/form

## Parameters

| Form | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| Form | OnValidSubmit | `EventCallback<TModel>` | `` |  |
| Form | OnInvalidSubmit | `EventCallback<TModel>` | `` |  |
| Form | Validator | `IFormValidator?` | `` |  |
| Form | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| Form | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| FormDescription | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| FormDescription | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| FormDescription | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

| FormField | Error | `string?` | `` |  |
| FormField | Required | `bool` | `` |  |
| FormField | Orientation | `FormFieldOrientation` | `FormFieldOrientation.Vertical` |  |
| FormField | LabelWidth | `string?` | `` |  |
| FormField | Name | `string?` | `` |  |

## Example
